scope.target: Integrated v0.5.0 candidate validation, hosted evidence, independent assessment, and release-readiness reconciliation

steps: Run complete deterministic and real-upgrade gates
Retain Windows and hosted Ubuntu evidence
Reconcile every backlog item and final report
Validate commit range and release-ready state
execution.last_completed_step: Committed and repository-verified the V050-010 release checkpoint at de7805b. Successor preflight confirmed AIC-001 and AIC-003 resolved and identified only workflow-level resume wording that still named the completed checkpoint action; this checkpoint refresh corrects that final AIC-002 lag.
execution.next_action: Run and persist an independent successor verification assessment against the refreshed containing commit, then reconcile final release readiness without tagging or publishing.

results.summary: Four-source implementation and hosted evidence pass; assessment remediation and successor verification remain active.
results.residual_risk: ASM-20260722-001#AIC-001 through AIC-003 require correction and successor verification. macOS and provider-native fixture gaps remain explicit. Tag and publication remain separately owner-authorized.
